there. What can you do for me?

Hello! I'm Buddy, your personal voice assistant. I can help with a wide range of tasks: 1. Answer Questions: Provide information on almost any topic. 2. Set Reminders and Alarms: Keep track of important events. 3. Control Your Home Devices: Turn lights on or off, adjust the thermostat, etc. 4. Make Recommendations: Suggest books, movies, recipes, or products based on your preferences. 5. Help with Homework: Explain concepts, solve problems, and provide study tips. 6. Plan Your Day: Schedule appointments, to-do items, and more. 7. Stay Informed: Get the latest news updates without breaking a sweat. 8. Manage Your Finances: Track expenses, budget, and
